allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); deps={**d.get\('dependencies',{}\),**d.get\('devDependencies',{}\)}; [print\(k,v\) for k,v in deps.items\(\) if 'storybook' in k.lower\(\) or 'vite' in k.lower\(\) or 'tailwind' in k.lower\(\)]")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); deps={**d.get\('dependencies',{}\),**d.get\('devDependencies',{}\),**d.get\('peerDependencies',{}\)}; [print\(k,v\) for k,v in sorted\(deps.items\(\)\)]")
